internal_links_used.anchor: single fixed rate of $599 per employee per month

plain_text_links_link_gate.label: Hiring in the United States, overview

compliance_cache_used: sprint/compliance-cache/colorado.json (FIRST Colorado page — wrote state_income_tax, sui, famli, withholding_forms, deposit_cadence, minimum_wage, local_payroll_tax blocks for siblings to reuse)
high_concern_flags: factual_uncertainty:prompt_correction — prompt cited SUI wage base $27,200 (that was 2025); verified actual 2026 is $30,600 per CDLE, 501(c) Services, and multiple secondary sources. Page uses $30,600.

factual_uncertainty:prompt_correction — prompt cited FAMLI 0.9% premium (that was 2024-2025); verified actual 2026 is 0.88% (decreased per FAMLI Division Director recalc effective 1 January 2026). Page uses 0.88% split 0.44/0.44.

factual_uncertainty:prompt_correction — prompt cited 'around 1.7%' new-employer rate; Colorado actually assigns introductory rate by NAICS industry code, with Base Rate + Support Rate + Solvency Surcharge structure. Page reflects this honestly without naming a single number.

factual_uncertainty:medium — SUI experience-rate range upper bound not verified against CDLE primary (cdle.colorado.gov returns 403 to WebFetch). Page uses cautious phrasing 'industry-assigned introductory rate; experience-rated band that depends on industry and your account's reserve ratio after sufficient quarters' rather than naming a specific min-max range.

factual_uncertainty:low — Denver OPT dollar amounts ($5.75 employee / $4.00 employer) and the four smaller-city OPT figures cited from widely-reported secondary sources; cross-check against City Treasury filings recommended before any client-pricing decision.
link_gate_warn:neighbour and Colorado-parent links rendered as plain text per link gate (targets ship wave 3-4)

compliance_cache_seed:wrote sprint/compliance-cache/colorado.json as FIRST Colorado page in sprint — subsequent CO pages (worker classification, wage/overtime, leave, termination) should reuse and only add page-specific deltas
